TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tjaialev, title = Tjaialev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjaialev} }

S.FORM: Tjaialev i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjaialev. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjaialev sa, 27 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 97 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 94 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 93%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjaiar~ɾə* i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjaiar~ɾə*. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjaiar~ɾə* sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, ** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Tjaialev i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Tjaialev. u kasalumaluma' nu Tjaialev sa, 27 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 97 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 94 ku tademaw, pakalatu 97%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 3%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 93%, Amis 2%, zumazuma 1%.
S.PHON: tjaiar~ɾə* i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu tjaiar~ɾə*. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu tjaiar~ɾə* sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, ** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, amis *%, zumazuma *%.
